attributes.title: PostgreSQL — SQL CRUD by origin
attributes.description: Stamped Postgres statements (application_name exercises-*;req=...). Click correlation.request_id to open HTTP handler logs.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"query":{"query":"service: exercises-postgres and application_name: *exercises* and (ps: (SELECT or INSERT or UPDATE or DELETE) or message: *statement*) and not message: *SELECT 1* and not message: duration*","language":"kuery"},"filter":[],"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index"}
